Size: 17×20×13cm
Model: 749036

items.name_cn:
Bright Red·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A best-seller that took over the entire fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Paris street Rue De Solferino, this bag features original patent Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed 'L' letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag closures. It's simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm

items.name_en: Burgundy patent leather quilted _CASSANDRE chain bag. A super practical small bag, Italian imported original top-grain cowhide, full leather interior and exterior. Exquisite craftsmanship with a square quilted pattern, classic metal logo adds personality, and a flap design ensures security. Removable shoulder strap. The bag features ten card slots, a bill compartment, two pockets, and a zippered interior pocket to hold everything!

items.name_en: CALYPSO Elephant Grain Calfskin Chain Bag
items.name_cn:
CALYPSO Elephant Grain Calfskin Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian calf leather, soft and smooth to the touch. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic four-clasp closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables. The minimalist interior design allows for effortless use.
Size: 35.5×21×9cm
Model: 777399

items.name_cn:
Caramel Calfskin
Extraordinary lightweight texture, named for the exquisite Y logo inspired by the fashion house's archival designs.
Elegant and structured, the handle features a hollow-out design and comes with an adjustable detachable shoulder strap for various carrying options.
Gives a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Unisex, suitable as a briefcase or travel tote, with extra-large capacity.
Model: 800224
Dimensions: 23×29.5×3-8.5cm
Handle Height: 7cm
Shoulder Strap Length: 48cm
